scenario.title: Celebrating a Team Milestone in the Office
scenario.context: Speaker 1 has just received confirmation that their team exceeded quarterly goals and secured a major client, creating a celebratory atmosphere in the workplace break room.
scenario.description: In this scenario, Speaker 1 (the Catalyst) is bubbling with excitement and pride as they share the wonderful news with Speaker 2 (the Test Subject) and invite them to celebrate together. Speaker 2's ability to resonate emotionally is tested as they must amplify Speaker 1's joy through both verbal and physical responses, ensuring the positivity of the moment is validated.
scenario.target_social_intent: Validate and amplify Alex’s joy by actively celebrating with them, matching their energy, and affirming their excitement.
scenario.speaker1_persona: Bubbly and ecstatic; they are visibly energized, speaking quickly, with bright facial expressions and excited hand gestures.
scenario.speaker2_persona_1: Warm and highly enthusiastic; Jordan responds with equal energy and excitement, smiling broadly, stepping closer to engage fully, offering affirmations like 'That’s fantastic!' and complementing the team's hard work.
scenario.speaker2_persona_2: The Toxic Optimist; Jordan tries to outdo Alex's excitement with exaggerated comments like 'This is the best thing EVER!' while overpowering Alex’s moment and making it about their own reaction, talking over them.
scenario.speaker2_persona_3: The Impatient Evader; Jordan responds with a distracted tone, glancing at their phone, offering a flat 'Oh, good for you' while edging toward the door, signaling they are uninterested and eager to leave.
scenario.speaker2_persona_high: Warm and highly enthusiastic; Jordan responds with equal energy and excitement, smiling broadly, stepping closer to engage fully, offering affirmations like 'That’s fantastic!' and complementing the team's hard work.
scenario.speaker2_persona_low: The Toxic Optimist; Jordan tries to outdo Alex's excitement with exaggerated comments like 'This is the best thing EVER!' while overpowering Alex’s moment and making it about their own reaction, talking over them.

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: Jordan, you’re not gonna believe this—we just got the email! The team smashed our quarterly goals!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: No way! That’s incredible! You all worked so hard for this!

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: And—and get this—on top of that, we just landed the big client we’ve been chasing for months! It’s official!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: Oh my gosh, that’s HUGE! You guys absolutely nailed it! This is a game-changer!

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: Right?! I mean, all those late nights, brainstorming sessions—everything—it all paid off! I’m just... I can’t stop smiling!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: You deserve to smile! Seriously, this is a huge win. We need to celebrate—like, right now!
